meta.question: List all organizations that have the same amount of models this organization. (Organization ID: 4d36ddb24c9e4cc38572abbd646c1e58)
meta.finalAnswer:
No other organizations have the same amount of models as organization ID 4d36ddb24c9e4cc38572abbd646c1e58 (Org25).

This organization has 5 models, but it is the only organization in the corpus with exactly 5 models. The distribution of models per organization shows:
- 1 model: 71 organizations
- 2 models: 9 organizations
- 3 models: 5 organizations
- 4 models: 2 organizations
- 5 models: 1 organization (this is Org25)
- 7 models: 2 organizations
- And other counts ranging from 8 to 40 models

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?org ?orgName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) AS ?modelCount) WHERE {
  ?org a bboExt:Organization .
  ?org bbo:name ?orgName .
  ?org tai:organizationId ?orgId .
  FILTER(?orgId = "4d36ddb24c9e4cc38572abbd646c1e58")
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
}
GROUP BY ?org ?orgName

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) AS ?modelCount) WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?org tai:organizationId "4d36ddb24c9e4cc38572abbd646c1e58" .
}

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?org ?orgName ?orgId (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) AS ?modelCount) WHERE {
  ?org a bboExt:Organization .
  OPTIONAL { ?org bbo:name ?orgName . }
  OPTIONAL { ?org tai:organizationId ?orgId . }
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
}
GROUP BY ?org ?orgName ?orgId
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) = 5)
ORDER BY ?orgName

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?org ?orgName ?orgId (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) AS ?modelCount) WHERE {
  ?org a bboExt:Organization .
  OPTIONAL { ?org bbo:name ?orgName . }
  OPTIONAL { ?org tai:organizationId ?orgId . }
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
}
GROUP BY ?org ?orgName ?orgId
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT ?model) = 5)
ORDER BY ?orgName
